servers.name: AutoKit Backend (Express API)
servers.description: Main Node.js API server. Serves REST endpoints, static dashboard at :8787, watches folders, runs pipelines.

servers.name: AutoKit Web (Next.js Frontend)
servers.description: Next.js dashboard frontend. Proxies API calls to the backend server. Depends on autokit-server being running.

servers.name: Ollama LLM (Agent / Transcript Analysis)
servers.description: Local LLM server used by the AutoKit agent and transcript analysis. Optional — the server runs without it but agent features and LLM-based analysis won't work.
servers.notes: Install with: brew install ollama (macOS) or see https://ollama.ai. Pull a model with: ollama pull llama3:8b
